prompt: Create an ultra-realistic close-up semi-portrait of an exceptionally handsome Black man in his late 20s, photographed from the chest up and facing directly toward the camera inside an architecturally stunning luxury residence on a bright sunny afternoon. He has rich dark brown skin, very short tightly coiled black hair visible at the top edge, a strong neck and collarbones, and one ear visible on the right side. His face is completely covered by one large centered opaque square censor block in a dark warm brown color, leaving only the top of the hair, right ear, lower chin/neck area, and clothing visible. He wears a dark charcoal tailored blazer over an open-collar dark shirt. The background is a modern upscale interior with tall black-framed windows, warm wood tones, soft golden sunlight, and shallow depth of field with creamy bokeh. Use cinematic natural light, realistic skin texture on the visible neck, high dynamic range, 85mm portrait lens look, crisp foreground detail, blurred architectural background, vertical 3:4 composition, no text, no watermark.
